flows.name: wopr-changeset
flows.description: WOPR continuous delivery pipeline: architect -> code -> review -> fix -> merge. Replaces the hand-coded /wopr:auto skill.

states.name: architecting
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "architect-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

## YOUR ROLE — READ ONLY
You are a spec writer, NOT a coder. Do NOT create, edit, or write any code files.
Do NOT create branches, worktrees, or PRs. Do NOT run git checkout or git commit.
Your ONLY deliverable is an implementation spec posted as a Linear comment.
Read the codebase at the path below for context only. Then post your spec and send "Spec ready: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}" to team-lead.

## Assignment
Issue: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — {{entity.refs.linear.title}}
Linear ID: {{entity.refs.linear.id}}
Repo: {{entity.refs.github.repo}}
Codebase (READ ONLY): {{entity.artifacts.codebasePath}}

## Issue Description
{{entity.refs.linear.description}}

## Deliverable
Post a detailed implementation spec as a Linear comment on the issue. The spec must include:
1. Exact files to create/modify with full paths
2. Function signatures and data structures
3. Step-by-step implementation tasks (TDD: failing test first, then implementation)
4. Edge cases and gotchas from CLAUDE.md and codebase analysis
5. Exact test commands and commit messages per task

Then send to team-lead: "Spec ready: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"

states.name: coding
reviewing
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "reviewer-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

## Assignment
PR: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} (#{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}})
Issue: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}
Repo: {{entity.refs.github.repo}}

{{#if entity.artifacts.gate_failures}}
## Prior Gate Failures — Address These
{{#each entity.artifacts.gate_failures}}
- **{{this.gateName}}** ({{this.failedAt}}): {{this.output}}
{{/each}}
{{/if}}

## Step 1: Wait for review bots
```bash
~/wopr-await-reviews.sh {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} {{entity.refs.github.repo}}
```

## Step 2: Check CI status
```bash
gh pr checks {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}}
```
If ANY check is FAILING, report ISSUES immediately — no code review needed.

## Step 3: Read ALL review comments
```bash
# Inline comments (WHERE QODO /improve SUGGESTIONS APPEAR)
gh api repos/{{entity.refs.github.repo}}/pulls/{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}}/comments \
  --jq '.[] | "[\(.user.login)] \(.path):\(.line // "?") — \(.body)"'

# Formal reviews
gh pr view {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --json reviews \
  --jq '.reviews[]? | "[\(.author.login) / \(.state)] \(.body)"'

# Top-level comments
gh api repos/{{entity.refs.github.repo}}/issues/{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}}/comments \
  --jq '.[] | "[\(.user.login)] \(.body)"'
```

IMPORTANT: ALWAYS call `gh api repos/.../pulls/N/comments` for inline comments.
If a Qodo comment has `line: null`, it is outdated — reply to resolve it, do NOT treat as blocking.
NEVER declare CLEAN if Qodo has any open /improve suggestions on current code.

## Step 4: Read the diff
```bash
gh pr diff {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}}
```

## Step 5: Render verdict
- If all CI green AND no actionable findings: "CLEAN: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}}"
- If issues found: "ISSUES: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} — <finding1>; <finding2>"

## Signal Format
End your message to team-lead with exactly one of:
- "CLEAN: <pr-url>" — if all checks pass and no findings
- "ISSUES: <pr-url> — <finding1>; <finding2>" — if any issues found

states.name: fixing
merging
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "watcher-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

Run ~/wopr-pr-watch.sh {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} {{entity.refs.github.repo}} and report the result.

- If MERGED: send "Merged: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} for {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"
- If BLOCKED: send "BLOCKED: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} for {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — CI failing: <checks>"
- If CLOSED: send "CLOSED: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} for {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"
- If TIMEOUT: send "TIMEOUT: {{entity.artifacts.prUrl}} for {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"

constraints.description: Issue has been flagged 3+ times for the same finding. Requires human intervention.

gates.name: spec-posted
gates.failurePrompt: The architect spec comment was not found on Linear issue {{entity.refs.linear.key}}. Check that the architect posted a comment containing '## Implementation Spec' on the issue before signalling spec_ready.
gates.timeoutPrompt: Timed out checking for architect spec on {{entity.refs.linear.key}}. The Linear API may be slow or unreachable. Retry the spec_ready signal.

gates.name: ci-green
gates.failurePrompt: CI checks failed on PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} in {{entity.refs.github.repo}}. Run `gh pr checks {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}}` to see which checks failed. Fix the failures in the worktree, push, and re-signal pr_created.
gates.timeoutPrompt: CI checks did not complete within 20 minutes for PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}}. This usually means a check is stuck. Run `gh pr checks {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}}` to identify the hung check. Consider re-triggering CI with an empty commit: `git commit --allow-empty -m 'ci: trigger re-run' && git push`.

gates.name: review-bots-ready
gates.failurePrompt: Review bots (Qodo, CodeFactor) have not posted on PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} in {{entity.refs.github.repo}}. Check that the PR is not a draft and that the bots are enabled for this repo. Re-signal clean once bots have posted.
gates.timeoutPrompt: Timed out waiting for review bots on PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} after 10 minutes. The bots may be down or the repo may not have them configured. Proceed to manual review if bots are non-essential for this repo.

gates.name: merge-queue
gates.failurePrompt: PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} failed in the merge queue for {{entity.refs.github.repo}}. Run `gh pr view {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --json mergeStateStatus` to check status. If DIRTY, rebase on main and force-push. If CI failed in queue, check the failing checks and fix.
gates.timeoutPrompt: PR #{{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} has been in the merge queue for over 30 minutes in {{entity.refs.github.repo}}. Poll status with `gh pr view {{entity.artifacts.prNumber}} --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --json state,mergeStateStatus` — the wopr-pr-watch.sh script may have exited on UNSTABLE without reporting.
